obligations.obligation:
Section 14 of the Act provides that the Appropriate Commission may, on an
application made under Section 15 of the Act, grant a licence to any person to
transmit electricity as a transmission licensee in any area as may be specified in the
licence.

include any company or body corporate or association or body of individuals,
whether incorporated or not, or artificial juridical person.
